license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.byfsptne
title: 5N HCl
author: Jacquelina.Woods

steps_raw.instruction: Slowly add 10.4 mL Hydrochloric Acid (HCl) Fisher Scientific Catalog #6000710 , or equivalent to the water. This solution should be prepared under a chemical fume hood.
Measure 14.6 mL of deionized or ultrapure water into sterile container.
